{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lightcasters
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Lightcasters]] are weapons that function in any atmosphere.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
